programmes.show_description: Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by participating in underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest.
Thriller inspired by true events with Arnold Schwarzenegger. The lives of two strangers become inextricably bound together after a devastating plane crash.
Legend returns soon.

An ex-convict claims that while he served time his girlfriend stole from his bank account; she claims the money was spent on him.
An altercation on St. Patrick's Day leads to a man allegedly spitting on a woman's car window; Judge Judy tracks down his accomplices.
A dog sitter makes an ill-fated decision to visit a locale with an allegedly dangerous large dog; a bruised spine and over 7k in vet bills soon follow.
A man claims he was bleeding profusely after an alleged attack by a pit bull whose owner claims it would never hurt anyone.
A man openly admits he doesn't pay taxes and sues a former friend for the return of property and for allegedly filing a false police report.
A wild party leaves a vacation rental in shambles after an intended group of 8 turns into a 'caught on video' gang of 30 partygoers.
Even though puppies look exactly like their dog, a mother and son deny that their pet was responsible and sue neighbours for an alleged attack.
Judge Judy advises a father to appeal any grievances against previous judges, as he takes on the mother of his teenager over child support.
Only two days after buying a used car, the new owner says the brake pads fell off when he put it in reverse; he is sued for the unpaid balance.

The Cold Case: This gripping series explores notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes. Each episode reveals the chilling stories behind the tragedies.
In this chilling episode, Michael O'Leary is murdered by his best friend Andrew Jones after an affair with Andrew's wife. Lured to Andrew's farm under false pretences, Michael is executed.
In November of 2016, Dr. Eric Scott Sills called 911 and reported finding his wife and business partner unresponsive at the bottom of the stairs.
When a man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was possible, until Police looked into his girlfriend's behaviour leading up to his death.
After Cally Jo Larson was found dead in her home, an investigation produced no suspects, until burglaries several months after the murder led police to the evidence they needed.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker investigates a mystery illness sweeping across the children on a Cherokee reservation from polluted water.
Fact-based gangster drama with Al Pacino. An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life - at the expense of his regular one.
Action thriller with Wesley Snipes. A federal marshal hellbent on justice and revenge teams up with a skydiver to capture a convict who escaped from custody after killing his brother.
Action thriller remake with Tom Berenger. A shipwrecked father and son wash up on an island only to discover they are on a hunting preserve owned by a merciless madman - and they're the prey.
Tense action with Michael Jai White. When a ruthless military assassin returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and get revenge.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A woman is hospitalized for a month after being repeatedly stabbed during a heated argument with her ex-girlfriend's sister.
The Judge questions a pregnant woman's need to bring a concealed weapon to a meeting with her ex-girlfriend.
While riding her scooter with a dog on either side, a woman claims the yapping of a neighbour's small Shihpoo caused her to fall.
The Judge admonishes a young woman for sizing up a mechanic based on how nice he is; she sues him for allegedly substandard work, fraud and negligence.
A woman claims she was forced to move out of her boyfriend's home because of the constant harassment by two of his ex-wives.
When a man passes away, his family contests and nullifies his recent wedding and sues his partner for allegedly stolen property.
A businessman is left holding a 36-month lease when his assistant returns to her native country; a friend steps in but is sued for alleged car damage.
A landlord allegedly goes off on a frightened mother and child who quickly move out; the landlord claims they left lice and bedbugs behind.
Though they admit they love each other, a mother and daughter bring their grievances over a car sale to court.

Trapped: This is a gripping series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes.
We explore the murder of Emma Caldwell, a 27-year-old whose body was found in Limefield Woods in 2005. Iain Packer, a sign installer with a violent past, evaded justice for years.
One woman, two husbands dead under strange circumstances - could she be that unlucky? Correspondent Erin Moriarty investigates.
A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi.
In 1993, Florida was known for attacks on tourists. An injury to a victim, a bite mark, would be a key piece of evidence used to convict a determinedly uncooperative suspect.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Alex is grievously wounded at Kim and Phil's wedding.
Remake of the 1976 action thriller, with Ethan Hawke. A sergeant must protect cops and prisoners when his station is besieged by a corrupt policeman and his crew on New Year's Eve.
Thriller with Jackie Chan. A former Vietnam War special ops soldier now running a Chinese restaurant in London seeks revenge against a terrorist group responsible for the death of his daughter.
